title: Download and Prepare RelBench rel-stack (Stack Exchange) Dataset
summary: Demo notebook for the RelBench rel-stack (Stack Exchange) dataset processing pipeline. Loads pre-processed data containing 9 FK-link sub-datasets (27 examples across badges, postLinks, postHistory, votes, and posts tables). Demonstrates deterministic fold assignment via MD5 hashing, explores schema topology and metadata (7 tables, 11 FK links, 6 benchmark tasks), processes cross-table prediction examples with parent→child feature alignment, and visualizes cardinality distributions and FK coverage across all relationships. Uses mini subset of the full 45K-example dataset.
